'''tazupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaibatsu|zaibatsu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaibatsu|zaibatsu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tazupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzipith|tæzipith]] || [[word:tæzipij|tæzipij]] || [[word:tæzipish|tæzipish]] || [[word:tæzipi|tæzipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazuzuputh|tazuzuputh]] || [[word:tazuzupuj|tazuzupuj]] || [[word:tazuzupush|tazuzupush]] || [[word:tazuzupu|tazuzupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazuputh|tazuputh]] || [[word:tazupuj|tazupuj]] || [[word:tazupush|tazupush]] || [[word:tazupu|tazupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazufputh|tazufputh]] || [[word:tazufpuj|tazufpuj]] || [[word:tazufpush|tazufpush]] || [[word:tazufpuf|tazufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazuputhu|tazuputhu]] || [[word:tazupuju|tazupuju]] || [[word:tazupushu|tazupushu]] || [[word:tazupuku|tazupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazuputh|tazuputh]] || [[word:tazupuj|tazupuj]] || [[word:tazupush|tazupush]] || [[word:tazupu|tazupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazuputhul|tazuputhul]] || [[word:tazupujul|tazupujul]] || [[word:tazupushul|tazupushul]] || [[word:tazupukul|tazupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazuputhuthu|tazuputhuthu]] || [[word:tazupujuju|tazupujuju]] || [[word:tazupushushu|tazupushushu]] || [[word:tazupuku|tazupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazuputhun|tazuputhun]] || [[word:tazupujun|tazupujun]] || [[word:tazupushun|tazupushun]] || [[word:tazupukun|tazupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazuputhuoro|tazuputhuoro]] || [[word:tazupujuoro|tazupujuoro]] || [[word:tazupushuoro|tazupushuoro]] || [[word:tazupukuoro|tazupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
